ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the research station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station's location */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth at which the station is located */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the station */,
  "sensor_count" INTEGER /* Number of sensors at the station */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which data is collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., Temperature, Salinity) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit of measurement */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data collected */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum expected value for the parameter */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum expected value for the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the data was collected */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter being measured */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the parameter */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was recorded */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the specific sensor that collected the data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_quality_flag" TEXT /* Flag indicating the quality of the data */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude where the data was collected */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude where the data was collected */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth at which the data was collected */,
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metadata associated with the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_records_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_records_metadata_id FOREIGN KEY ("metadata_id") REFERENCES metadata ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_records_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Organization or institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique session identifier for the user's session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES data_records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file for integrity verification */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the file content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES data_records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record the metadata belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metadata related to the record */,
  "metadata_type" TEXT /* Type of metadata */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the metadata */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the metadata was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES data_records ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit of measurement */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter that the unit corresponds to */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Factor to convert the unit to a standard unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_units_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations_parameters" (
  "station_parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter being measured at the station */,
  "measurement_interval" TEXT /* Interval at which the parameter is measured */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor used for the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stations_parameters_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stations_parameters_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record being assessed */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score assigned to the data record */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the quality assessment */,
  "assessed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assessed the data quality */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the quality was assessed */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the quality assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_assessed_by FOREIGN KEY ("assessed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES data_records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_records" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the original data record */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the parameter at the recorded date */,
  "recorded_date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded historical value */,
  "source_record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the original record from which the historical record was derived */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the historical data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_records_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES data_records ("record_id")
)
